feature: Home page should support guest state controls, guest navigation, and login entry from the Person button

userStory: Home page should support guest state controls, guest navigation, and login entry from the Person button

As a guest user, I want the Home page to display the guest-state controls and guest-accessible feature buttons, so that I can use the application before login and open the Login page from the Person/Profile button.
This application is a single page application (SPA).
The workflow begins at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is the primary landing page for both unauthenticated users and authenticated users.
This workflow covers only the guest-state behavior of the Home page before login.
The Home page in this workflow should be treated as the guest state of the existing Home page, not as a separate page from the authenticated Home state.
GUEST HOME STATE When the application is launched and the user has not signed in, the Home page should load in guest state.

In guest state, the Home page displays the approved guest and shared controls, including: Person/Profile button Back button Notification button Home button Guest-accessible feature buttons Known guest-accessible feature buttons include: Customer signup button Clean survey button Site survey button GUEST-STATE EXPECTATIONS In guest state: The Person/Profile button should be visible and enabled.
Clicking the Person/Profile button should open the Login page or Login view.
Guest-accessible feature buttons should be visible and enabled.
Guest-accessible feature buttons should navigate to their supported destinations.
Authenticated-only controls and authenticated-only feature buttons should not be visible or should not be actionable.

The logged-in user name button should not be visible in guest state.

keywords: Verify Home Guest State Controls Are Visible
Verify Home Guest State Controls Are Enabled

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state when application is launched
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the approved guest-state Home controls without showing authenticated user information.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible and enabled for guest users.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button opens the Login page from guest Home state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view opens from the guest-state Home page and the transition occurs without requiring authentication first.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Customer signup navigates to the customer-search page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates to the customer-search page from the guest Home page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Clean survey navigates to the vehicle-survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates to the vehicle-survey page from the guest Home page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Site survey navigates to the survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates to the survey page from the guest Home page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled after navigating back from a guest-accessible feature page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The user returns to the Home page in guest state and the Home button remains visible and enabled.

validations: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Back button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Notification button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Home button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Customer signup button is visible and enabled for guest users.
The Clean survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.
The Site survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.
The user returns to the Home page in guest state and the Home button remains visible and enabled.
transitions: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the approved guest-state Home controls without showing authenticated user information.
The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Back button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Notification button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Home button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.
The Login page or Login view opens from the guest-state Home page and the transition occurs without requiring authentication first.
The application navigates to the customer-search page from the guest Home page.
The application navigates to the vehicle-survey page from the guest Home page.
The application navigates to the survey page from the guest Home page.
The user returns to the Home page in guest state and the Home button remains visible and enabled.
